name: Tuscany White Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Dry great northern beans - washed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook, stirring often, until soft (about 5 minutes).
3. Drain and rinse the dried beans.
4. Add the drained beans, water, bay leaves, and crushed dried basil to the pot.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to maintain a simmer.
6. Cover and cook until the beans are tender, about 2 hours. Stir occasionally and add more liquid if needed.
7. Remove from heat, season with salt and white pepper.
8. Using an immersion blender, puree the soup in batches until smooth.
9. Return the purée to the pot and reheat over moderate heat, stirring often.
10. Blend in the remaining olive oil.
11. Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and green onion. If the soup is too thick, add more water or chicken broth.
Food Exchange Per Serving: 2 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 293; CHO: 37g; PRO: 13g; FAT: 11g; SOD: 256; CHOL: 0g; Low-Sodium Diets: Omit Salt.
